steps.title: Translate the product
steps.content:
A number that is $74$ more than $x$ is $x+74$. The function gives the product of the number and that larger number, so write:
$$
f(x)=x(x+74)
$$

steps.title: Expand the expression
steps.content:
Distribute $x$ to get the equivalent quadratic form:
$$
f(x)=x(x+74)=x^2+74x
$$
This is the form that must match the correct equation.

steps.title: Pick the matching equation
steps.content: Choice A adds an extra $x$ term and constant, choice B misses the $74x$ term, and choice D adds an extra constant. Choice C matches $x^2+74x$. The answer is C.
